verses.text: Topa in, “Israel mite aw, na kilehkik nop uh leh kei kiangah hong kilehkik un. Na kihhuainate uh kei kiang pan na paihkhiat uh a, na tai kawikawi kei uh a
‘ Topa a nuntak bangin,’ ci-in, thuman tak, kiptak, thutang takin thu na ciam nak uh leh gam khempeuh in thupha ka piak ding hong ngen ding uh a, kei' sungah amaute a lungdam ding uh hi,” a ci hi
Judah gammite leh Jerusalem khuamite tungah Topa in hih bangin ci hi: “Na lote uh kal un la, ling lakah khai vawh kei un

Judah mite leh Jerusalem khuamite aw, Topa' thu zui un la, lungsim takpi tawh zui un. Na tuacih kei uh leh na bawl uh mawhnate hangin ka hehna mei bangin hong kuangkhia ding a, a phelhzo kuamah omlo ding hi,” a ci hi.
Judah gamah va gen un la, Jerusalem khua-ah va taangko un. Gamsung khempeuhah peengkul mutin awng un la, va gen un. Hong kikhawm un la khuapi muan'huaite sungah va bu ni, va ci un
Zion paina lampi kihilh un la, na suahtakna dingun tai un; zekai kei un. Bang hang hiam cih leh leilu lam panin siatna lianpi ka hong puaksuk hi

Humpinelkai khat a bukna sawlkawm panin hong kuankhiazo a, gamte a susia dingpa hong paikhiazo hi. Na gam uh a kisiasak ding leh na khuapite uhah kuamah a ten'lohna dingin a susia dingin ama omna panin hong kuankhia khinzo hi
Tua ahih manin puanhampi silhin tau-in kap un. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa' hehna lauhuaipi eite' kiang panin kiheikhia nailo hi
Topa in, “Tua ni ciangin kumpipa leh kumpi uliante lungkia ding uh a, siampite lau mahmahin, kamsangte dipkua ding uh hi,” a ci hi

Tua ciangin keimah in, “Ah, Topa Pasian aw, nangmah in hih mite leh Jerusalem khuamite khem cih takin na khem khinzo hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amau kiangah, ‘Nopna hong om ding hi,’ ci napi-in, amau a sunlum dingin namsau khat a om gige hi,” ka ci hi

Tua hun ciangin hih mite leh Jerusalem khua mite kiangah, “A sa mahmah huih, sehnel gam a sang mun panin ka mite tungah hong nung ding a, tua huih pen anvaite a zapsiang dingin a nung huih bang hilo hi
Ka sawl huih pen tua bang dingin hat lua ding hi. Tu-in Topa in amaute tungah thu khenin a gen hi,” kici ding hi
En un, meii bangin i galpa hong pai a, a sakol leengte pingpei tawh kibang a, a sakolte muvanlai sangin manlang zaw hi. Gimna i thuak ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh gal lel ding ihi ta hi
Jerusalem khua aw, nang hong kihotkhiatna dingin na lungsim sung panin gitlohna sawpkhia in. Na sungah gitlohna lungsim bang tanvei kemcip ding na hi hiam
Ngai un; Dan gam panin aw khat hong ging a, Efraim Mual panin kisiatna ding thu hong kitaangko hi
Minamte kiangah va gen un la, Jerusalem kiangah va taangko un. “Gamlapi panin mite hong pai uh a, Judah gam khuapite langpangin hong kiko uh hi
Judah gam in kei hong langpan' ahih manin lohongte bangin a galte in a kimkotah a pang dimdiam uh hi, Topa in kong ci hi
Na lungsim leh na gamtatnate' hangin nang' tungah hih thu hong tung hi. Hih pen nangma gitlohna hang hi a, na lungtang pailetin hong sun hi,” a ci hi
Aw, ka lungtang, ka lungtang! Na ka sa mahmah hi. Ka lungtang kisai vanvan a, ka om hithiat thei kei hi; bang hang hiam cih leh peengkul mutna aw, gal kisimna aw ka za hi
Siatna khat khit ciangin adang khat hong tung a, gamsung khempeuh kisia khinta hi. Thakhat thu-in ka bukte hong kisuksiatsak a, ka puankhaite kikekgawp hi
Bang tanvei galkisimna mu lai ding ka hi hiam? Bang tanvei peengkul aw za lai ding ka hi hiam
Topa in, “Ka mite hai uh a, kei hong theilo uh hi. Naupang haite bang uh a, bangmah theilo uh hi. A sia bawl ding lamsang siam bek uh hi. A hoih bangmah bawl theilo uh hi,” a ci hi
Leitung ka et leh limlemel neilo a, vantungah zong khuavak omlo hi
Mualte ka et leh kiling damdam uh a, mual neute kileh kawikawi uh hi
Ka khuadak leh mi khat beek ka mu kei a, vana vasate zong a leengmang khin uh hi
Ka et leh, logam leihoih teng sehnel gam suakkhin a, Topa' mai, a hehna lianpi mai-ah, khuapi khempeuh kisia khin uh hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in, “Gam buppi, gamlak suak ding a, ahih hangin ka susia sam kei ding hi
Tua thu hangin leitung kap ding a, vantung mial ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh ka gensa, ka khensatsa hi a, ka kisikloh bangin ka lungsim zong ka khelkik kei ding hi,” a ci hi
Sakol tunga tuangte leh thal tawite' aw a kizak ciangin mi khempeuh galtai mang uh a, gamlakah tai-in suang lakah a kahto uh hi. Khuapi khempeuh kinusia khin a, kuamah teng nawnlo hi

Jerusalem khuapi aw, a siacip ding na hita hi. Puansan silhin kham tawh na kizep liatluat hangin, na mitte zemin na golsak hangin, a mawkna-in a kizem na hita hi. Na lawm ngaihte in nang hong nusia ta uh a, tu-in hong that nuam ta uh hi

Nau a suak ding numei a kiko bang khat ka za a, tacil a suak numei' tauna tawh kibang hi. Zion' tanu husam liangin a kikona aw na hi a, a khutte gel zakin, “Gimna ka thuak ding hi. Kei hong that ding uh hi,” a ci hi.
